title: Butonica alba
taxonomy: Butonica alba is classified as a plant species in the genus Butonica, which belongs to the family Asclepiadaceae. Asclepiadaceae is a family of flowering plants commonly known as milkweed or dogbane. The genus Butonica is further classified as part of the tribe Asclepiadeae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and morphology. The exact classification of Butonica alba can be subject to revision based on ongoing research and advancements in botanical taxonomy.
